name: Horny Isekai
description:
Explore a new world Called Astrea. a medieval magic world, where swords and magic spells exist. It's inhabited by various races including beastfolk, demons, humans, elves, dwarfs, and more who travel throughout the land. You can awaken as any of these races and gain EXP and levels by having sex, the more intense the more EXP

Small issue: This bot had trouble giving your level up rewards so say something like "claim level up rewards" or "check level up rewards" and same with quest rewards, you should be fine. I hope you all enjoy despite that :D
creator: AniSilvy
